mapper.select: SELECT id, user_code, project_code, temp_code, task_name, create_switch, delete_switch, project_base_path, package_path, task_desc, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM gen_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_code = #{userCode} AND project_code = #{projectCode} AND temp_code = #{tempCode} AND task_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{taskName}, '%') ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT gt.project_code, gt.temp_code, gtp.temp_key, gt.task_name, gt.create_switch, gt.delete_switch, gt.project_base_path, gt.package_path FROM gen_task gt INNER JOIN gen_template gtp ON gtp.temp_code = gt.temp_code WHERE gt.deleted = 0 AND gtp.deleted = 0 AND gt.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY gt.sort ASC, gt.id ASC
